title: Writing the User Endpoint

posts.author: JetEnduro95 (Jeryl Teo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to write user endpoint as such?
“https://api.monday.com/v2/me”

In the app I’m trying to create, I am able to get the relevant data i need but I don’t know how to write the endpoint as above to parse data.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JetEnduro95

I’m afraid that at this time, it is not possible to create a user via the API, and we do not currently provide an option to do what you are looking to achieve here.

I’m more than happy to pass this as feedback along to the product team to review and prioritize this suggestion accordingly. To be transparent with you, I am not able to commit to an ETA or even a rough timeline just yet, though.

I hope this helps clarify!

-Alex
